title: Copilot Status Tooltip
description: Status bar tooltip popup for Copilot Free — quick settings with toggles, eagerness control, and snooze action.
author: Team

title: Agent Orchestration Board
description: Kanban-style control board for tracking multi-agent orchestration with real-time status, dependency visualization, and human-in-the-loop decision points.
author: Team

title: Counter Demo
description: A simple interactive counter using React state. Demonstrates that client components work within the prototype sandbox.
author: Team

title: Hello World
description: A minimal static prototype to validate the scaffold. Nothing fancy — just proof that the system works.
author: Team

title: Approvals Section
description: Prototype of an Approvals section in the VS Code Agent Customizations editor, surfacing tool/server/URL approval management with inline checkboxes and workspace/user groups.
author: Harald Kirschner

title: Approvals Section (Separated)
description: Variant with Customizations and Approvals as separate sidebar section groups with their own headers.
author: Harald Kirschner
